description_long: This object is a stylized doll with an elongated, distorted human form, posed dynamically as if suspended in mid-air by a wide, brown fabric or ribbon. The doll has a light brown skin tone and is dressed in a black top and black shorts, with the fabric wrapping around its body and supporting it from above. The limbs are exaggeratedly stretched and bent, giving the figure a surreal, almost fluid appearance. The head is round with short, closely-cropped hair, and the facial features are delicately modeled, showing a focused expression. The overall surface is smooth and matte, with subtle shading to indicate muscle tone and clothing folds. The brown fabric appears to be an integral part of the composition, suggesting an acrobatic or aerial performance theme.
description: A stylized, elongated doll suspended by a wide brown fabric, dressed in black athletic wear with a smooth, matte finish and a focused facial expression.
description_view_0: The doll is seen from the front, with the face, torso, and the supporting brown fabric clearly visible, highlighting the dynamic pose and the black clothing.
description_view_1: A side view emphasizing the extreme elongation and curvature of the limbs, with the head and one arm extending forward and the brown fabric supporting the upper body.
description_view_2: A rear-angled view showing the back of the doll, the attachment of the brown fabric, and the bent legs, with the black shorts and top partially visible.
description_view_3: A side-rear view focusing on the stretched legs and the way the brown fabric wraps around the doll, with the head turned slightly and the limbs in a dramatic pose.
attribute_clothing_style: Athletic-inspired outfit consisting of a black crop top and black shorts, with no visible patterns or logos, suitable for acrobatic or performance themes.
attribute_pose: The doll is posed in a dynamic, aerial position with one arm extended forward, the other bent and gripping the supporting fabric, legs dramatically stretched and bent, and the torso arched as if performing an acrobatic maneuver.
attribute_facial_expression: Focused and neutral, with eyes directed forward, lips closed, and eyebrows slightly furrowed.
attribute_hair_style: Short, closely-cropped hair with a smooth texture and a natural brown color.
